title: InSituVaneResultProperties
description: InSituVaneResultProperties: Properties related to the results based on the in situ hand vane tests.

VaneResidualResult.description: Vane test Residual Result (IVAN_IVAR). Property has a quantity of type Pressure measured in [Pa].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
